title: Vapi-Powered Voice Assistant with GPT-5 for Job Screening

targets.title: GitHub - tahangz/Vapi-AI-Voice-Assistant: A full-stack voice assistant application built with Vite + React on the frontend and Flask on the backend, integrated with Vapi and powered by GPT-5. The app allows users to fill in personal details
